sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94346" key="siteutw/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῑτ-ευτώριος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n94346.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">poultry-fattener</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Facet.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">59</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
